response.text:
Built a new AFG31000 flow that sets CH1 to a 1 kHz, 2 Vpp sine into 50 Ω and turns the output on.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Create a new pyvisa AFG31000 flow to configure CH1 for a 1 kHz 2 Vpp sine wave into 50 ohms and enable output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"afg1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"AFG31000 Sine 1kHz 2Vpp 50ohm Output On","description":"Connect to the AFG31000, configure CH1 as a 1 kHz 2 Vpp sine wave with 50 ohm output impedance, and turn the output on.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"AFG","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"write","label":"Configure CH1 Sine","params":{"command":"SOURce1:FUNCtion:SHAPe SINusoid; SOURce1:FREQuency:FIXed 1000; SOURce1:VOLTage:LEVel:IMMediate:AMPLitude 2"},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"write","label":"Set Output 50 Ohm and Enable","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:IMPedance 50; OUTPut1:STATe ON"},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"]},"id":"s1_4"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Create a new pyvisa AFG31000 flow to configure CH1 for a 1 kHz 2 Vpp sine wave into 50 ohms and enable output.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.

flow.name: AFG31000 Sine 1kHz 2Vpp 50ohm Output On
flow.description: Connect to the AFG31000, configure CH1 as a 1 kHz 2 Vpp sine wave with 50 ohm output impedance, and turn the output on.
